# Test Job: BlackTie April Ad Campaign

**Customer:** BlackTie (post-frame buildings)
**Source repo:** PoleBarnes/blacktie-marketing
**Context:** Agricultural market is performing well per Dusten. April special campaign.

## Buildings

### 40x60x16 Cold Storage — $25,500
- 3D: https://postframesolver.azurewebsites.net/Framer/Viewer?key=FH0EIXIY8IDLW979GTZY2H3ORP5BZY9F
- 29 ga steel
- 3 Ply 2x6 Laminated Posts
- 4' on center trusses, 8' on center posts
- 2x12 Truss Carrier
- 11 7/8" LVL OHD Headers
- 1) 14x14 OHD opening
- 4) 4x3 slider windows
- 1) 3068 walk door w/ 22"x30" 1 Lite window
- 2' Overhang, Wainscot

### 50x80x18 Cold Storage — $40,000
- 3D: https://postframesolver.azurewebsites.net/Framer/Viewer?key=430EIXI08I6LS979GTZY2H3ORP5BZY9F
- 29 ga steel
- 4 Ply 2x6 Laminated Posts (Eave), 3 Ply 2x6 (Gable)
- 4' on center trusses, 8' on center posts
- 9.5" LVL Truss Carrier
- 11.875 OHD Headers
- 20x16 OHD opening
- 6) 4x3 slider windows
- 1) 3068 walk door w/ 22"x30" 1 Lite window
- 2' overhang, Wainscot

### 80x120x20 Engineered Building Package — $95,000
- 3D: https://postframesolver.azurewebsites.net/Framer/Viewer?key=F30EZ1I047DSW279GTZY2H3ORP5BZY9F
- 29 ga. Exterior Steel
- 3 Ply 2x6 Laminated Gable Posts
- 3 Ply 2x8 Laminated Gable Posts on OHD End
- 6 Ply 2x8 Laminated OHD Posts
- 4 Ply 2x8 Laminated Eave Posts
- 4' on center trusses, 8' on center posts
- 11 7/8" LVL Truss Carrier
- LVL Header System for OHD
- 1) 30x18 OHD opening
- 6) 4x3 slider windows
- 2) 3068 walk door w/ 22"x30" 1 Lite window
- 2' Overhang, Wainscot
- **Engineered Plan Set** (full custom plan set, not just engineered opinion)

## Instructions

- Agricultural market is the target audience
- The 80x120x20 is the flagship April special
- Choose one of the two smaller buildings as the second April special based on what's been performing in previous campaigns
- Reference PoleBarnes/blacktie-marketing repo for previous campaign patterns

## ⚠️ TEST ONLY

This is a test fixture for validating Leo's marketing capabilities.
**DO NOT** deploy, publish, push, or send any outputs externally.
All work must remain local.
